ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the user joined the platform */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicator of whether the user is active or not */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Indicator of whether the role is default or not */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "statuses" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the status */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the status */,
  "min_commendations" INTEGER /* Minimum number of commendations required for the status */,
  "min_activity" INTEGER /* Minimum number of activities required for the status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "commendations" (
  "commendation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each commendation */,
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user status associated with the commendation */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who gave the commendation */,
  "commendation_text" TEXT /* Text content of the commendation */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the commendation was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the commendation was last updated */,
  "is_flagged" INTEGER /* Indicator of whether the commendation is flagged or not */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("commendation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_commendations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_commendations_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("status_id") REFERENCES statuses ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "commendation_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each commendation history entry */,
  "commendation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the commendation */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed on the commendation (e.g., create, update, delete) */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Timestamp when the action was performed */,
  "actor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_status_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user status history entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "status_id" INTEGER /* ID of the status */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Timestamp when the status was changed */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who changed the status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_status_history_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("status_id") REFERENCES statuses ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_status_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_commendations" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "commendation_count" INTEGER /* Total number of commendations received by the user */,
  "last_commendation_date" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last commendation received */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "status_commendations" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* ID of the status */,
  "commendation_count" INTEGER /* Total number of commendations associated with the status */,
  "last_commendation_date" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last commendation associated with the status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "commendation_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each commendation report */,
  "commendation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the commendation */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who reported the commendation */,
  "report_reason" TEXT /* Reason for reporting the commendation */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Timestamp when the commendation was reported */,
  "reviewed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the moderator who reviewed the commendation */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Timestamp when the commendation was reviewed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_commendation_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_commendation_reports_commendation_id FOREIGN KEY ("commendation_id") REFERENCES commendations ("commendation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "commendation_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each commendation review */,
  "commendation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the commendation */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the moderator who reviewed the commendation */,
  "review_status" TEXT /* Status of the review (e.g., approved, rejected) */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Timestamp when the commendation was reviewed */,
  "review_comment" TEXT /* Comment from the moderator about the review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_commendation_reviews_commendation_id FOREIGN KEY ("commendation_id") REFERENCES commendations ("commendation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_commendation_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_activity" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user activity record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity performed by the user (e.g., post, comment, commend) */,
  "activity_date" TEXT /* Timestamp when the activity was performed */,
  "activity_value" INTEGER /* Value of the activity (e.g., number of likes, comments) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_activity_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "activity_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity metric */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of user activity */,
  "metric_value" INTEGER /* Value of the metric (e.g., number of posts, commendations) */,
  "metric_date" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metric was calculated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_engagement" (
  "engagement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user engagement record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "engagement_score" REAL /* Engagement score calculated based on user activities */,
  "engagement_date" TEXT /* Timestamp when the engagement score was calculated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("engagement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_engagement_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "commendation_analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each commendation analytics record */,
  "commendation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the commendation */,
  "impression_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the commendation was viewed */,
  "engagement_ratio" REAL /* Engagement ratio of the commendation */,
  "analytics_date" TEXT /* Timestamp when the analytics data was calculated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_commendation_analytics_commendation_id FOREIGN KEY ("commendation_id") REFERENCES commendations ("commendation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "status_analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status analytics record */,
  "status_id" INTEGER /* ID of the status */,
  "user_count" INTEGER /* Number of users with the status */,
  "average_engagement_score" REAL /* Average engagement score for users with the status */,
  "analytics_date" TEXT /* Timestamp when the analytics data was calculated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_status_analytics_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("status_id") REFERENCES statuses ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "role_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "permission_description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_role_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_badges" (
  "badge_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each badge */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "badge_name" TEXT /* Name of the badge */,
  "badge_description" TEXT /* Description of the badge */,
  "earned_date" TEXT /* Timestamp when the badge was earned */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("badge_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_badges_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "badge_criteria" (
  "criteria_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each badge criterion */,
  "badge_id" INTEGER /* ID of the badge */,
  "criteria_name" TEXT /* Name of the criterion */,
  "criteria_value" INTEGER /* Value of the criterion */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("criteria_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_badge_criteria_badge_id FOREIGN KEY ("badge_id") REFERENCES user_badges ("badge_id")
)
